entries.label: Dawn of the Jedi
entries.note: The mythic origins of the Force and the first Jedi, tens of thousands of years before the Skywalker Saga.

entries.label: Fall of the Jedi · Prequel Era
entries.note: The twilight of the Republic, the Clone Wars, and the rise of the Empire out of Order 66.
The 2008 theatrical film that launched the animated series.

entries.label: Reign of the Empire · Original Trilogy
entries.note: The galaxy under Imperial rule, the Rebellion's rise, and the Battle of Yavin that defines the timeline's zero point.

entries.label: The Battle of Yavin - Year Zero
entries.note: The destruction of the first Death Star. The galaxy-standard calendar counts outward from here: everything before is BBY, everything after is ABY.

entries.label: The New Republic
entries.note: The fragile post-Endor era, where Mandalorians and bounty hunters fill the power vacuum left by the Empire.

entries.label: Rise of the First Order · Sequel Era
entries.note: A new dark power emerges thirty years after Endor, and the Skywalker Saga reaches its conclusion.

entries.label: A New Jedi Order
entries.note: The post-Saga galaxy as a new generation rebuilds the Jedi from the ashes of war. Placements provisional.

summary: Every canonical Star Wars feature film, ordered by where it sits on the in-universe timeline rather than by release. Released, in-production, and announced titles are all included; the LEGO and holiday specials are not.
title: Canon Films Timeline
